Plaintiff Anne Thayer'S Motion For Relief Per Ccp 473(B) [Per Order Of 06/02/10, Continued From 06/07/10 To 06/08/10]
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Anne Thayer's Motion for Relief Per CCP 473(B). Appearances: Ernest Thayer, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 436-9495 appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party; Sarah N. Leger, Esq. Ragghianti Freitas LLP (415) 453-9433, appearing for Defendants and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is denied. Request for sanctions denied. Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Continued To Nov-20-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BENJAMIN FRANKLIN PLUMBING, and, DAN GAGNE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend to allow plaintiff to establish and plead standing. No statutory authority or case law supports contractual rights as community property. The causes of action are not time-barred. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
